title: neocupressus guadalupensis
intro: Neocupressus guadalupensis, also known as Guadalupensis Cypress or Mexican Cypress, is a plant species in the Cupressaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neocupressus guadalupensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote respiratory health.
